title: jasminum wrayi
intro: Jasminum wrayi, also known as the Wrayi jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Jasminum wrayi include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
